debug_info.goal:
case isFalse
p : ℕ
inst✝¹ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝ : NeZero p
el : ZMod p
er : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)
cl : Option Unit
cr : Circuit p (ZMod p)
w : ℕ
he : el = er.eval
hc : Simulation.s_bisim cl cr.eval
x✝¹ : Option Unit
x✝ : Unit → Option Unit
a✝ : Unit
hel : er.eval.val < 2 ^ w
h✝ : ¬er.eval.val < 2 ^ w
⊢ Simulation.s_bisim cl cr.eval

proof:
simp_all [Not]
      <;>
      (try { contradiction })
      <;>
      (try { cases p <;> simp_all [Nat.Prime, NeZero] <;> contradiction })
failed_attempts:
(try simp_all [ZMod.val_nat_cast]) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try linarith) <;>
    (try ring_nf at *) <;>
    (try nlinarith)

· simp_all [assert_range]
      <;>
      (try contradiction) <;>
      (try simp_all) <;>
      (try omega)
    · exfalso
      have h₂ : ¬(er.eval.val < 2 ^ w) := h
      have h₃ : er.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
        simp_all [assert_range]
      contradiction

have h₁ : er.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by simpa using hel
      have h₂ : ¬er.eval.val < 2 ^ w := h✝
      exact h₂ h₁
    exfalso
    exact h

by_contra h
      have h₁ : er.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by simpa using hel
      have h₂ : ¬er.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by simpa using h✝
      contradiction

{
        exfalso
        simp_all [Circuit.eval, Option.bind, assert_range]
        <;>
        (try omega) <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try linarith)
        <;>
        (try
          {
            cases p <;> simp_all [Nat.Prime, Fact.out, NeZero.ne']
            <;>
            norm_num at *
            <;>
            omega
          })
      }

exfalso
      have h_false : ¬(er.eval.val < 2 ^ w) := by
        simp_all [ZMod.val_natCast]
        <;>
        (try omega) <;>
        (try simp_all [ZMod.val_natCast]) <;>
        (try omega) <;>
        (try linarith) <;>
        (try nlinarith)
      simp_all [ZMod.val_natCast]
      <;>
      (try omega) <;>
      (try simp_all [ZMod.val_natCast]) <;>
      (try omega) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try nlinarith)
successful_attempts:
simp_all [Not]
      <;>
      (try { contradiction })
      <;>
      (try { cases p <;> simp_all [Nat.Prime, NeZero] <;> contradiction })

(try omega) <;>
      (try
        {
          cases h : er.eval.val < 2 ^ w with
          | inl h =>
            simp_all
          | inr h =>
            simp_all
        }) <;>
      (try
        {
          cases h : er.eval.val < 2 ^ w with
          | inl h =>
            simp_all
          | inr h =>
            simp_all
        })
